sentences.target: Le pan du rideau traîne par terre.
sentences.reading: /lə pɑ̃ dy ʁido tʁɛn paʁ tɛʁ/

translations.fr: Le pan du rideau traîne par terre.
translations.ipa: /lə pɑ̃ dy ʁido tʁɛn paʁ tɛʁ/
translations.en: The curtain flap is dragging on the floor.
translations.es: El borde de la cortina se arrastra por el suelo.
translations.de: Der Saum des Vorhangs schleift über den Boden.
translations.it: L'orlo della tenda striscia sul pavimento.
translations.pt: A barra da cortina está arrastando no chão.
translations.vi: Gấu rèm đang kéo lê trên sàn.
translations.nl: De zoom van het gordijn sleept over de vloer.
translations.hu: A függöny alja a padlón vonszolódik.
translations.hi: परदे का किनारा फर्श पर घिसट रहा है.
translations.pl: Brzeg zasłony ciągnie się po podłodze.
translations.el: Το στρίφωμα της κουρτίνας σέρνεται στο πάτωμα.
translations.id: Bagian bawah tirai menyeret di lantai.
translations.ro: Marginea perdelei se târăște pe podea.
translations.cs: Lem závěsu se táhne po podlaze.
translations.da: Gardinens nederste kant slæber hen over gulvet.
translations.ja: カーテンの裾が床を引きずっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'pan'.
Common noun meaning a section/flap of fabric; syntactic subject of the verb.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition introducing 'rideau' and marking a possessive/partitive relation.
Common noun complement of 'du' indicating the curtain.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; indicates the flap is dragging/hanging.
Preposition forming the fixed expression 'par terre'.
Common noun; together with 'par' forms the adverbial PP 'par terre' meaning 'on the ground'.

sentences.target: Le pan de ta chemise dépasse.

translations.fr: Le pan de ta chemise dépasse.
translations.en: The tail of your shirt is sticking out.
translations.es: Se te asoma el faldón de la camisa.
translations.it: Ti spunta il lembo della camicia.
translations.pt: A barra da sua camisa está de fora.
translations.vi: Vạt áo sơ mi của bạn đang thò ra.
translations.nl: De zoom van je overhemd steekt eruit.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी शर्ट का किनारा बाहर निकला हुआ है.
translations.el: Σου προεξέχει το κάτω μέρος του πουκαμίσου.
translations.ja: シャツの裾がはみ出ている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'pan'.
Common noun referring to the flap/tail of the shirt; subject of the verb.
Preposition introducing the possessive phrase 'ta chemise'.
Second-person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'chemise'.
Common noun complement of 'de'; denotes the garment.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; indicates the flap protrudes.

sentences.target: Un pan du mur vient de tomber.
sentences.reading: /œ̃ pɑ̃ dy myʁ vjɛ̃ də tɔ̃be/

translations.fr: Un pan du mur vient de tomber.
translations.ipa: /œ̃ pɑ̃ dy myʁ vjɛ̃ də tɔ̃be/
translations.en: A section of the wall just fell.
translations.es: Se acaba de caer un trozo de pared.
translations.de: Ein Teil der Wand ist gerade heruntergefallen.
translations.it: Un pezzo del muro è appena caduto.
translations.zh-Hans: 墙的一块刚刚掉了下来。
translations.yue: 牆身有一塊啱啱跌咗落嚟。
translations.pt: Uma parte da parede acabou de cair.
translations.tr: Duvarın bir bölümü az önce düştü.
translations.vi: Một mảng tường vừa rơi xuống.
translations.nl: Een stuk van de muur is net naar beneden gevallen.
translations.hu: A fal egy darabja az imént leesett.
translations.hi: दीवार का एक हिस्सा अभी-अभी गिरा है.
translations.el: Ένα κομμάτι από τον τοίχο μόλις έπεσε.
translations.nb: En del av veggen falt nettopp ned.
translations.sv: En del av väggen föll precis ner.
translations.ro: O bucată din perete tocmai a căzut.
translations.da: En del af væggen er lige faldet ned.
translations.ja: 壁の一部がたった今落ちた。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'pan'.
Common noun meaning a section/piece; subject of the clause.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition introducing 'mur' (possessive relation).
Common noun complement of 'du'; denotes the wall.
Verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; in the periphrastic construction 'venir de' expressing the recent past ('has just').
Preposition as part of the 'venir de' construction, linking to the infinitive.
Infinitive verb; lexical predicate of the recent past construction ('has just fallen').

sentences.target: J'ai coincé le pan de ma jupe.
sentences.reading: /ʒe kwɛ̃se lə pɑ̃ də ma ʒyp/

translations.fr: J'ai coincé le pan de ma jupe.
translations.ipa: /ʒe kwɛ̃se lə pɑ̃ də ma ʒyp/
translations.en: I got the flap of my skirt stuck.
translations.es: Se me enganchó el bajo de la falda.
translations.de: Ich habe mir den Rocksaum eingeklemmt.
translations.it: Mi si è incastrato l'orlo della gonna.
translations.pt: A barra da minha saia ficou presa.
translations.vi: Vạt váy của tôi bị kẹt.
translations.nl: De zoom van mijn rok is vast komen te zitten.
translations.hi: मेरी स्कर्ट का किनारा फँस गया.
translations.el: Το στρίφωμα της φούστα μου σφηνώθηκε.
translations.nb: Kanten på skjørtet mitt satte seg fast.
translations.da: Jeg fik nederdelens kant i klemme.
translations.ja: スカートの裾を引っ掛けてしまった。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before the auxiliary 'ai' (avoir), 1st person singular present; forms the passé composé.
Past participle used with 'avoir' to form the perfect; denotes the action of wedging/sticking something.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'pan'.
Common noun; direct object of 'coincé'.
Preposition introducing the possessive phrase 'ma jupe'.
First-person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'jupe'.
Common noun complement of 'de'; denotes the garment.
